text: Confirmed with Alice: Postgres is the way forward for Atlas. We are dropping MongoDB. Bob will update the Docker compose files.
Orion project kicking off in Q2. Python and Airflow for the pipeline, Postgres as the sink. Grace will present the architecture to the team next week.
TypeScript migration is on track. React components looking clean. Dave finished the dashboard. We decided to use Vite for the build system going forward.
